global_brief: 今日AI领域持续活跃，多项研究聚焦于LLM评估、安全与推理效率。OpenAI的GPT-5.5在网络安全测试中与备受关注的Mythos Preview表现相当，同时马斯克诉奥特曼案披露了大量证据。此外，多项关于推测解码、奖励模型去偏及智能体强化学习的新研究发布，显示出行业对模型实用性与可控性的深入探索。

highlight_facts.title: GPT-5.5 matches heavily hyped Mythos Preview in new cybersecurity tests
highlight_facts.summary: GPT-5.5 matches heavily hyped Mythos Preview in new cybersecurity tests；New results suggest Mythos' cyber threat isn't "a breakthrough specific to one model."
